name: Souhaib Ben Taieb
bio: Associate Professor and Associate Department Chair at MBZUAI focused on AI for weather forecasting and climate resilience.

name: Salman Khan
bio: Associate Professor of Computer Vision at MBZUAI working on geospatial AI, climate resilience, and practical vision-language systems.

name: Lily Burns
bio: Sr. Advisor at MBZUAI supporting undergraduate programs, student experience, campus partnerships, and policy coordination.

name: Mohammed Irfan
bio: PhD student focused on personalized AI and wearables, building creative systems that stay human-centered and useful in daily life.

name: Akbobek Abilkaiyrkyzy
bio: Project manager leading AI and climate initiatives at MBZUAI, with experience across machine learning, logistics, and energy transition.

name: Bilal Ashfaq
bio: Master's student in Statistics and Data Science researching AI agent security, with experience in software engineering and mentorship.

name: Nicolas Cuadrado
bio: PhD candidate in Machine Learning researching efficient models, compression, reinforcement learning, and sustainable energy systems.

name: Aya Laajil
bio: Research engineer in Statistics and Data Science working on AI-driven weather forecasting for Africa and probabilistic calibration.

name: Nokhutula Madekufamba
bio: Master's student in Big Data Science and Mastercard Foundation Scholar focused on data science, machine learning, and responsible AI.

name: Caivil Ndobela
bio: Bioinformatics scholar with research, teaching, and mentorship experience across Southern Africa and postgraduate training support.
